title: stipa pennata var. lutetiana
intro: Stipa pennata var. lutetiana, also known as blue oat grass, is a type of ornamental grass native to Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestion. Blue oat grass can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
